Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 25 

DTRY_NTRTNL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Dietary or Nutritional Services Provider Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the dietary and nutritional service provider 
category; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: DTRY_NTRTNL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: DTRY_NTRTNL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR
